title: Question: V3Ast.cpp Node has no back, already unlinked error
body:
---


Author Name: **Taedong Jung**
Original Redmine Message: 2074 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello,

An error happens during RTL to SystemC conversion.

*%Error: Internal Error: my_rtl.v:32: ../V3Ast.cpp:472: Node has no back, already unlinked?*

As a result of checking, it is difficult to find a solution.

```
my_rtl.v : 32 : my_interface.master if_m[NUM - 1:0],
            33 : my_interface.slave if_s[NUM - 1:0] 

```

```
interface my_interface #(
  parameter ADDR = 32,
  parameter DATA = 64
);
logic request;
logic [ADDR-1:0] addr_;
logic [DATA-1:0] data_;
modport slave(
 input request,
 input addr_,
 output data
);
modport master(
 output request,
 output addr_,
 input data
);
endinterface

```

command : --sc MY_TOP.v -O3 -Wno-WIDTHCONCAT -Wno-UNOPTFLAT -Wno-COMBDLY -Wno-STMTDLY --trace -Mdir gen_my_top -f files.f --compiler gcc -CFLAGS -fno-var-tracking --top-module MY_TOP -clk clk_a -CFLAGS -O3 -LDFLAGS -O3

Thanks
